pages.title: Void Pearl
pages.text: A remnant of darkness, decay, and survival that should not be possible. The Pearl grows strongest where light weakens and death starts to lose its claim.

pages.title: Dormant and Latent
pages.text: $(l)Dormant$(): Grants airless survival, strips away harmful effects, inflicts withering decay on strikes, and may deny a lethal blow.$(br2)$(l)Latent$(): Harmful effects are cleared even faster, and the Pearl becomes more reliable at refusing death without yet revealing its full hunger.

pages.title: Awakened, Ascended, Transcendent, Apex
pages.text: $(l)Awakened$(): In low light, nearby enemies begin suffering a field of wither and weakness, and fatal blows are no longer left to chance.$(br2)$(l)Ascended$(): Darkness now feeds the bearer directly with speed and attack speed, while decayed enemies hit back more weakly.$(br2)$(l)Transcendent$(): The aura widens, strips beneficial effects, and the Pearl's refusal of death becomes far more complete.$(br2)$(l)Apex$(): The bearer becomes hardest to kill in darkness, and decayed prey below the threshold can simply be finished outright.
